requirements.summary: Remove the embedded Google Maps iframe from the contact section while preserving the text address display
acceptanceCriteria: The Google Maps iframe element is completely removed from the rendered page
The address text 'Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduvadi-413208' remains visible and properly formatted
The contact section layout adjusts gracefully without the map component
No broken references or console errors related to the removed map

file_operations.description: Remove the Google Maps iframe element from the contact section while keeping the address text 'Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduvadi-413208' intact. Adjust the layout structure to ensure the contact section displays properly without the map, maintaining the existing medical-themed styling and ensuring the address remains visible and well-formatted.
